text:
- Update to 20131024
- Fix build with clang and libc++
- Remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
- Respect CXXFLAGS
- Strip shared library
- Support STAGEDIR
- Sort PLIST
- Use single space after WWW:

Port maintainer (jlaffaye@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
